=== Refactor Application Results ===

=== [R1] Refactor 0: "Wrap with pipe" ===

--- file:///.src/makeSchemaOpaque_brand.ts ---
// refactor: 4:14-4:23
import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"

export const pipe(ProductId) = Schema.NonEmptyString.pipe(Schema.brand("ProductId"))


=== [R1] Refactor 1: "Toggle type annotation" ===

--- file:///.src/makeSchemaOpaque_brand.ts ---
// refactor: 4:14-4:23
import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"

export const ProductId: Schema.brand<Schema.NonEmptyString, "ProductId"> = Schema.NonEmptyString.pipe(Schema.brand("ProductId"))


=== [R1] Refactor 2: "Toggle lazy const" ===

--- file:///.src/makeSchemaOpaque_brand.ts ---
// refactor: 4:14-4:23
import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"

export const ProductId = () => Schema.NonEmptyString.pipe(Schema.brand("ProductId"))


=== [R1] Refactor 3: "Make Schema opaque" ===

--- file:///.src/makeSchemaOpaque_brand.ts ---
// refactor: 4:14-4:23
import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"

export const ProductId_ = Schema.NonEmptyString.pipe(Schema.brand("ProductId"))
export type ProductId = Schema.Schema.Type<typeof ProductId_>;
export type ProductIdEncoded = Schema.Codec.Encoded<typeof ProductId_>;
export type ProductIdDecodingServices = Schema.Codec.DecodingServices<typeof ProductId_>;
export type ProductIdEncodingServices = Schema.Codec.EncodingServices<typeof ProductId_>;
export const ProductId: Schema.Codec<ProductId, ProductIdEncoded, ProductIdDecodingServices, ProductIdEncodingServices> = ProductId_;


=== [R1] Refactor 4: "Make Schema opaque with namespace" ===

--- file:///.src/makeSchemaOpaque_brand.ts ---
// refactor: 4:14-4:23
import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"

export const ProductId_ = Schema.NonEmptyString.pipe(Schema.brand("ProductId"))
export interface ProductId extends Schema.Schema.Type<typeof ProductId_> { }
export namespace ProductId {
    export type Encoded = Schema.Codec.Encoded<typeof ProductId_>;
    export type DecodingServices = Schema.Codec.DecodingServices<typeof ProductId_>;
    export type EncodingServices = Schema.Codec.EncodingServices<typeof ProductId_>;
}
export const ProductId: Schema.Schema<ProductId, ProductId.Encoded, ProductId.DecodingServices> = ProductId_;
